result.summary: The page is largely intact, but there are several visual clipping/truncation issues: the 'Hot Games' navigation tab label is cut off, game tiles on the right edge are truncated without a clear carousel affordance, and the bottom row of games is clipped by the fixed bottom navigation bar. There are also some minor contrast and spacing concerns.

issues.description: The last visible top navigation tab is truncated, showing 'Hot Gar' instead of the full label (likely 'Hot Games'), with the text cut off mid-word at the right screen edge.
issues.suggestion: Ensure horizontally scrollable nav tabs either fade out gracefully or show a partial tile rather than clipping text mid-word; add a scroll indicator or gradient fade to signal more content.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles ('Millionaire', the pigs game, 'Dark Waters') is abruptly clipped by the fixed bottom navigation bar, cutting the images roughly in half.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area equal to the bottom nav height so tiles are not obscured, or ensure the clipped state clearly reads as scrollable content.

issues.description: Game tiles in each carousel row are cut off at the right edge (e.g., 'MAGNI... PHO...', 'MUNC... MI...', 'HYPERC...'), with truncated title text visible on the artwork.
issues.suggestion: This may be intentional carousel peeking, but consider showing a cleaner partial tile or adding scroll arrows/affordances so the truncation looks deliberate rather than broken.

issues.description: Text overlays on the promo banner (e.g., 'BONUS CODE WELCOME' in blue on yellow) and small info 'i' icons may have insufficient contrast and small touch targets.
issues.suggestion: Verify contrast ratios meet WCAG AA and ensure interactive info icons have at least 44x44px touch targets.

issues.description: The search icon button on the left of the tab bar is partially clipped at the left screen edge, appearing cut off compared to other pill-shaped tabs.
issues.suggestion: Add left margin/padding so the search pill is fully visible and aligned consistently with the other navigation pills.
